positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala composition featuring bioluminescent deep-sea flora and cosmic astronomical elements. The design should incorporate intricate, flowing Art Nouveau curves mixed with geometric precision. Focus on interconnected motifs of luminous celestial bodies, detailed crystalline leaves, stylized coral, and swirling nebulous smoke. Color palette: deep indigo, electric cyan, vibrant magenta, and gold accents, creating extreme jewel-toned contrast against a muted background. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly scalable for apparel printing, resembling a sophisticated stencil or vector illustration. Clean silhouettes, ethereal glow, ultra-detailed linework, high contrast, mystical, psychedelic pop art style.
